analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet condemns leaks of IAEA confidential reports to the US press as "shameful," while noting they confirm good Iran–IAEA cooperation. Evaluation of narratives: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – The tweet implies Western (US) media promptly receive leaked confidential reports, casting the West/US-linked press as unethical actors. This portrays Western behavior as improper and hostile, aligning with RU1. RU2 – No promotion of Russia or an alternative multilateral system; not applicable. RU3 – Does not portray Russia as a benevolent partner; not applicable. RU4 – No historical praise of Russia; not applicable. RU5 – No claim of Russia’s forefront achievements; not applicable. RU6 – Cultural/nature content absent; not applicable. Conclusion: Only RU1 is supported.
